# pfsense_package (Resource)

Manages pfSense packages. Installs a package from the official repository by name, or from a URL for third-party packages. Removing the resource uninstalls the package.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pfsense_package" "example" {
  name = "pfSense-pkg-nmap"
}

# Install a third-party package from a URL
resource "pfsense_package" "custom" {
  name        = "pfSense-pkg-saml2-auth"
  package_url = "https://example.com/packages/pfSense-pkg-saml2-auth-0.4.txz"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Package name (e.g. 'pfSense-pkg-saml2-auth').

### Optional

- `package_url` (String) URL to a `.pkg` file for third-party package installation. When set, the package is installed via `pkg-static add` from this URL instead of the official repository. Changing this forces reinstallation.

### Read-Only

- `installed_version` (String) Currently installed version of the package.
- `description` (String) Package description.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import an installed package by its name
terraform import pfsense_package.example pfSense-pkg-nmap
```
